title: Mini Plastic Food Storage Pots with Lids – 8 Pack Weaning Containers – Airtight, Leakproof, Microwave & Freezer Safe – Reusable Snack, Sauce & Meal Prep Containers – travel Stackable & BPA-Free
features: ✅ Perfect for Weaning & Snacks – Ideal portion-sized containers for purees, snacks, sauces, or leftovers. Great for at-home feeding or on-the-go parents.
✅ Airtight & Leakproof Lids – Each pot comes with a secure snap-on lid to prevent spills, leaks, and food odor transfers.
✅ Microwave, Freezer & Dishwasher Safe – Heat and store food safely. BPA-free plastic withstands freezing or reheating with no warping or staining.
✅ Compact, Stackable & Space-Saving – Nest neatly in your fridge, freezer, or lunch bag. Keep your kitchen and meal prep organized.
✅ Reusable, Durable & Eco-Friendly – Save money and reduce waste with these long-lasting, easy-to-clean containers designed for everyday use.
description: Mini Plastic Food Storage Pots with Lids – 8 Pack Weaning Containers – Airtight, Leakproof, Microwave & Freezer Safe – Reusable Snack, Sauce & Meal Prep Containers – Stackable & BPA-Free Simplify your kitchen storage and mealtime routine with this 8-pack of Mini Plastic Food Storage Pots with Lids . Whether you're prepping for baby weaning, portioning snacks, or storing leftover sauces, these versatile containers are a must-have for busy parents and organized kitchens. Each container features a leakproof, airtight lid to keep contents fresh and prevent messes. Made from BPA-free, microwave and freezer-safe plastic , they’re safe for reheating meals or storing them long-term. Dishwasher-safe for easy cleaning, these containers are designed to be stackable and compact , helping you save valuable space. Perfect for everything from baby food to condiments, yogurt, nuts, or lunch prep — these reusable containers offer convenience, durability, and sustainability in one.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher Safe, Freezer safe, Hand wash safe, Wipe with a damp or dry cloth when necessary, ‎Microwave safe
